title: India Search Innovation
subtitle: Redefining information access for diverse Indian users.
problem_statement: Indian users face fragmented information access and language barriers, hindering seamless digital discovery.

approach.goal: Understand primary user needs for local and multilingual search in India.
approach.method_desc: Best for new market entry, uncovering unmet needs and cultural nuances.

pillars.title: Accessibility
pillars.insight: Users need information in their native language for true access.

pillars.title: Relevance
pillars.insight: Users seek precise, context-aware results for specific needs.

pillars.title: Efficiency
pillars.insight: Users want quick answers without friction or unnecessary steps.

artifacts.label: Strategy
artifacts.title: Defining the Challenges
questions: How might we simplify information discovery?
How might users find local content easily?
How might we innovate language search?

points.name: Bing
points.desc: Generic search, some features, less local.

points.name: Local Directories
points.desc: High local, low features, often outdated.

points.name: Google (Current)
points.desc: Broad search, many features, good local.

personas.name: Rohan Sharma
personas.quote: I need quick, accurate tech info for my projects.
personas.bio: Tech-savvy professional seeking efficient information retrieval for work and personal interests.

personas.name: Priya Singh
personas.quote: I need local business insights and customer reviews.
personas.bio: Entrepreneur seeking local market trends, supplier info, and customer reviews.

insights: Where can I find a good local tailor?
How do I translate this text?
Will this search understand my accent?
I wish I could find local services faster.
Clicks on top results, scans snippets.

points.action: Replace generic search with AI-driven local recommendations.
Integrate voice search with real-time translation capabilities.
points.benefit: Breaks language barriers instantly for diverse users.

points.action: Adapt visual search for local landmarks and products.
points.benefit: Easier discovery of physical world information.

points.action: Modify search results to prioritize community-generated content.
points.benefit: Builds trust and local relevance for users.

pivot.before: Generic search results with limited local context and language support.
pivot.pivot_logic: Leverage AI and local data to provide hyper-personalized, multilingual information discovery.
pivot.after: Intuitive, context-aware search engine for India's diverse population.

annotations.title: Multilingual Input
annotations.rationale: Catters to India's linguistic diversity, enhancing accessibility.

annotations.title: Voice Search Icon
annotations.rationale: Enables hands-free, natural language queries for convenience.

annotations.title: Minimalist Layout
annotations.rationale: Reduces cognitive load, focusing user attention on search task.

data.finding: Search bar is prominent and clearly visible.
UI elements consistent across desktop and mobile.
No explicit error prevention mechanisms visible.
Offers multiple language options for user choice.
